entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange and DeFi platform originally described as Bitcoin Dex on HECO and later tracked across HECO, BSC, Ethereum, Avalanche, and OKTChain. Current DeFi trackers still report non-zero TVL and small recent DEX volume, so HEI classifies BXH as active rather than inactive or dead.
entity.notes: The backlog row came from the DefiLlama DEX feed. No reliable first-party launch announcement or terminal notice was recovered in this batch, so launch_date and death_date remain null. Current activity is low but non-zero in DefiLlama, supporting active status.

evidence.title: BXH protocol profile and DEX metrics
evidence.notes: Profile identifies BXH as Bitcoin Dex on HECO and reports current TVL and DEX volume metrics across multiple chains.

evidence.title: BXH exchange market profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies BXH as a decentralized trading platform across BSC, Heco, Ethereum, and OKExChain-related networks and preserves the official website and social links.
